---
title: "Tutorials"
description: "Runnable, worked examples using the EpiAware packages together."
toc: false
---

Worked examples that run the packages together on a real modelling task, one per [approach](/approaches/index.qmd).
We are adding these as executed pages on this site.
Until each lands here, its approach links to a runnable walkthrough in the package's own documentation.

::: {.feature-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
### Composed distributions
Compose, censor, and modify delay distributions together on line-list data — ComposedDistributions, CensoredDistributions, and ModifiedDistributions in one workflow.
[Read the approach &rarr;](/approaches/composed-distributions.qmd)

[Runnable walkthrough ↗](https://composeddistributions.epiaware.org/dev/getting-started/)
:::
::: {.feature-card}
### Composable Turing models
Assemble and fit a joint infection model from interchangeable latent, infection, and observation parts.
[Read the approach &rarr;](/approaches/composable-turing-models.qmd)

[Runnable walkthrough ↗](https://composableturingidmodels.epiaware.org/dev/overview/)
:::
:::

Have a tutorial you'd like to see?
Suggest it on the [forum](https://community.epinowcast.org/) or see [Contributing](/contributing.qmd).
